heading: Powers
label: 154506 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15450636:2802., , .Oct. 19, 1984Pub. L. 98–520, § 298 Stat. 2428The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
